title: epic-map
description: Traceability map from created Jira epics back to PRD requirement IDs. Consumed by the user-story skill.

source_prd.description: path to the PRD.md this was decomposed from

epic_key.description: Jira issue key returned by the MCP, e.g. LEARN-12. Use a placeholder like FA-1-PENDING if created via CSV fallback.

requirement_ids.description: FR/NFR IDs from the PRD covered by this epic. Every PRD requirement must appear in exactly one epic across the whole map.
